robots: robots.txt unreachable (treated as allow for public GET)
note: Published CAG findings on KPCL/RPCL (documented context, not new allegations). Extend from the CAG Karnataka report library locally.

records.subject: Cost & time overrun; project cost escalation
records.detail: Project cost rose from ₹8,806.23 cr (Apr 2009 estimate) to ₹12,915.90 cr (provisional, Mar 2018) due to delays.
records.citation: CAG Report No. 5 of 2019 (PSUs, Government of Karnataka)

records.subject: Cost of generation per unit escalated
records.detail: Per-unit generation cost rose from ₹3.24 to ₹5.36 (provisional).
records.citation: CAG Report No. 5 of 2019 (PSUs, Government of Karnataka)

records.subject: Extra power-procurement cost from YTPS delay
records.detail: 22,283.03 MU of short/medium-term power procured (2014-15 to 2017-18) to meet the deficit, at ₹2,517.92 cr additional cost.
records.citation: CAG Report No. 5 of 2019 (PSUs, Government of Karnataka)

records.subject: Delay in levy of liquidated damages (BHEL); avoidable entry tax
records.detail: 2×500 MW (Unit-I Mar 2009, Unit-II Feb 2013). BHEL tardiness on Unit-II; LD levy delayed. ₹5.88 cr entry tax (2009-11) avoidable.
records.citation: CAG Report No. 9 of 2014 — Performance Audit, BTPS (Karnataka PSUs)
